creator: rsimmons0@gmail.com
text:
This problem seems like it is related to the following PR:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=174696

The maintainer pointed to where the problem is located, but offered no fix.  Firefox still doesn't build.

Also, this may be related to this problem:
http://cygwin.com/ml/cygwin/2011-09/msg00353.html


  adding: hyphenation/hyph_sh.dic (deflated 69%)

  adding: hyphenation/hyph_tr.dic (deflated 64%)
  adding: hyphenation/hyph_uk.dic (deflated 70%)

gmake: *** [install] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/www/firefox.

===>>> Installation of firefox-19.0,1 (www/firefox) failed

Terminated
===>>> Upgrade of libGL-7.6.1_2 to libGL-7.6.1_3 complete


===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> www/firefox

How-To-Repeat: Build firefox from ports.
